True Science Peptides – Precision Peptides for Advanced Research Applications At True Science Peptides, we specialize in the development and distribution of premium-grade research peptides, proteins, and amino acid derivatives intended exclusively for laboratory use. Our team utilizes both automated and manual synthesis technologies, including state-of-the-art solid-phase and solution-phase methodologies, to deliver highly consistent and reliable compounds. All peptide batches are independently tested through Vanguard Laboratories, a certified analytical facility based in Olympia, Washington. Using advanced High-Performance Liquid Chromatography (HPLC) and Mass Spectrometry (MS) techniques, each compound is verified for molecular identity, purity (≥99%), and structural integrity—providing confidence in every research application. From synthesis to secure packaging and temperature-conscious fulfillment, we maintain strict quality assurance protocols at every step. True Science Peptides products are not intended for human or veterinary use and are supplied for research purposes only.
